intentSynonyms: get an env var in netlify
look up an env var in netlify
fetch a single env var in netlify
view one specific env var in netlify
get environment variable by key in netlify
description: Get a specific environment variable by key for a Netlify account. Optionally scope to a specific site. Returns the variable name, scopes, context-specific values, and secret status.

account_id.description: The account ID the variable belongs to

site_id.description: Optional site ID to scope to a specific site
